commit.message:
fix: terminal resize, filtered-view columns, palette dispatch toast (#16)

Closes #11: runTUI now listens for SIGWINCH (unix build tag; no-op
stub elsewhere), re-reads the terminal size, and re-renders --
resizing no longer leaves a stale-geometry quarter-screen app.

Closes #12: filter results always render the standard runs table;
the all-green celebration is reserved for the unfiltered home
state, so Event/Duration columns survive filtering. The run-number
column widened to 8 so six-digit openclaw run numbers stop
shifting the workflow column, and the all-green header's Age label
right-aligns with its values.

Closes #13: opening the command palette no longer surfaces
dispatch-resolution errors as toasts in repo-wide sessions; the
generic dispatch entry stays, and the error surfaces as a route
error only when dispatch is actually selected.

Red-first tests for all three, including a SIGWINCH delivery test
and rune-aware column-parity pins.
